Make combined dataset

SCATTERPLOT (FIGURE 3); BURSTINESS x FREQUENCY of all words in daylong transcripts

## 
##  Pearson's product-moment correlation
## 
## data:  data_daylong_all$Burstiness and data_daylong_all$Frequency
## t = 8.0893, df = 5152, p-value = 7.421e-16
## alternative hypothesis: true correlation is not equal to 0
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  0.08494828 0.13886794
## sample estimates:
##       cor 
## 0.1119905
